name: Color
summary: The Color class represents an RGB color with transparency. The color values must be between 0.0 and 1.0.

constructors.name: Color
constructors.summary: Creates a new color object. The default object is black.

constructors.name: Color
constructors.signature: public Color(double Red, double Green, double Blue)
constructors.summary: Creates a new color object with the given values.

params.name: Red
params.doc: The red value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: Green
params.doc: The green value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: Blue
params.doc: The blue value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

constructors.name: Color
constructors.signature: public Color(double Red, double Green, double Blue, double Transparency)
constructors.summary: Creates a new color object with the given values.

params.name: Red
params.doc: The red value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: Green
params.doc: The green value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: Blue
params.doc: The blue value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: Transparency
params.doc: The transparency value of the color, between 0.0 (completely see-through) and 1.0 (completely solid).

properties.name: Blue
properties.summary: The blue value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

properties.name: Green
properties.summary: The green value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

properties.name: Red
properties.summary: The red value of the color, between 0.0 and 1.0.

properties.name: Transparency
properties.summary: The transparency value of the color, between 0.0 (completely see-through) and 1.0 (completely solid).
